body:
Disabling the docker context moves the problem to another module:

```console
$ starship timings

 Here are the timings of modules in your prompt (>=1ms or output):
 golang      -  3072ms  -   ""
 character   -    <1ms  -   "$ "
 directory   -    <1ms  -   " in ﱮ ~ "
 fill        -    <1ms  -   " "
 line_break  -    <1ms  -   "\n"
 username    -    <1ms  -   "ryan"
ryan in ﱮ ~                                                     3s
$ nvim .config/starship.toml  # disabled golang module
starship timings
ryan in ﱮ ~ ✦                                                   6s
$ starship timings

 Here are the timings of modules in your prompt (>=1ms or output):
 python      -  3080ms  -   ""
 character   -    <1ms  -   "$ "
 directory   -    <1ms  -   " in ﱮ ~ "
 fill        -    <1ms  -   " "
 line_break  -    <1ms  -   "\n"
 username    -    <1ms  -   "ryan"
```
